title: cleisostoma macphersonii
intro: Cleisostoma macphersonii, also known as the Macpherson's Cleisostoma, is a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of Papua New Guinea. This orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma macphersonii include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Cleisostoma macphersonii is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
